name: memhub
description: Auto-capture Claude Code sessions into MemHub team memory. Incremental flushes on commit/PR events (PostToolUse hooks) plus a SessionEnd backstop read the transcript and save it via the memhub-staging MCP, which runs tool-aware (agentic) extraction of facts, episodes, and artifacts with watermark-based delta dedup. Also ships /memhub:save-artifact for terminal artifact uploads.
